chunks.text:
api_name:
  Flintstone API
version:
  2.1.0
description:
  The comprehensive API for managing prehistoric Bedrock operations, citizens, and resources
base_url:
  https://api.bedrock.stone
authentication:
  type:
    stone_token
  header:
    X-Stone-Token
  description:
    Carved stone tokens required for all API access. Tokens expire every yabba-dabba-doo cycle.
rate_limits:
  standard:
    100 requests per mammoth hour
  premium:
    500 requests per mammoth hour
  enterprise:
    Unlimited (powered by Brontosaurus)
endpoints:
  citizens:
    /api/v2/citizens:
      GET:
        description:
          Get all citizens of Bedrock
        parameters:
          family:
            string (optional) - Filter by family name (Flintstone, Rubble, etc.)
          occupation:
            string (optional) - Filter by job (quarry_worker, dinosaur_crane_operator, etc.)
          neighborhood:
            string (optional) - Filter by area (cobblestone_lane, granite_street, etc.)
          limi

(optional) - Filter by job (quarry_worker, dinosaur_crane_operator, etc.)
          neighborhood:
            string (optional) - Filter by area (cobblestone_lane, granite_street, etc.)
          limit:
            integer (optional) - Max 100 per request
          offset:
            integer (optional) - For pagination
        response_example:
          citizens:
              id:
                FRED001
              name:
                Fred Flintstone
              family:
                Flintstone
              occupation:
                Quarry Worker
              address:
                301 Cobblestone Way
              spouse:
                Wilma Flintstone
              children:
                - Pebbles Flintstone
              pet:
                Dino
              catchphrase:
                Yabba-Dabba-Doo!
              bowling_average:
                165.4
              created_at:
                Stone Age Year 2
              status:
                active

hphrase:
                Yabba-Dabba-Doo!
              bowling_average:
                165.4
              created_at:
                Stone Age Year 2
              status:
                active
          total_count:
            47
          pagination:
            limit:
              20
            offset:
              0
            has_more:
              True
      POST:
        description:
          Register a new citizen in Bedrock
        required_fields:
          - name
          - occupation
          - address
        request_example:
          name:
            Bamm-Bamm Rubble
          family:
            Rubble
          occupation:
            Strong Baby
          address:
            303 Cobblestone Way
          special_abilities:
            - Super strength
            - Rock lifting
    /api/v2/citizens/{citizen_id}:
      GET:
        description:
          Get detailed information about a specific citizen
        path_parameters:
          citizen_id:

- Rock lifting
    /api/v2/citizens/{citizen_id}:
      GET:
        description:
          Get detailed information about a specific citizen
        path_parameters:
          citizen_id:
            string - Unique citizen identifier (e.g., FRED001)
      PUT:
        description:
          Update citizen information
        note:
          Only the citizen themselves or clan chief can update
      DELETE:
        description:
          Remove citizen from Bedrock registry
        warning:
          This action cannot be undone - citizen will be exiled to the Land of the Lost
  dinosaurs:
    /api/v2/dinosaurs:
      GET:
        description:
          List all working dinosaurs in Bedrock
        parameters:
          species:
            string (optional) - brontosaurus, stegosaurus, pterodactyl, triceratops
          job_type:
            string (optional) - construction, transportation, entertainment, pet
          availability:
            boolean (optional) - Filter ava

aurus, pterodactyl, triceratops
          job_type:
            string (optional) - construction, transportation, entertainment, pet
          availability:
            boolean (optional) - Filter available dinosaurs
          size:
            string (optional) - small, medium, large, colossal
        response_example:
          dinosaurs:
              id:
                DINO001
              name:
                Dino
              species:
                Snorkasaurus
              owner:
                Fred Flintstone
              job_type:
                pet
              special_skills:
                - Barking
                - Knocking over Fred
                - Licking faces
              size:
                medium
              diet:
                Rocks and bones
              temperament:
                Friendly
              availability:
                False
              last_checkup:
                Stone Age Year 5, Mammoth Month 3
      POST:
        descr

temperament:
                Friendly
              availability:
                False
              last_checkup:
                Stone Age Year 5, Mammoth Month 3
      POST:
        description:
          Register a new working dinosaur
        required_fields:
          - name
          - species
          - owner
          - job_type
    /api/v2/dinosaurs/rental:
      POST:
        description:
          Rent a dinosaur for temporary work
        pricing:
          construction_dinosaur:
            50 clams per day
          transportation_dinosaur:
            30 clams per day
          entertainment_dinosaur:
            75 clams per day
        request_example:
          species:
            brontosaurus
          rental_duration_days:
            7
          job_type:
            construction
          project_location:
            Slate Rock and Gravel Company
          insurance_required:
            True
  businesses:
    /api/v2/businesses:
      GET:
        d

construction
          project_location:
            Slate Rock and Gravel Company
          insurance_required:
            True
  businesses:
    /api/v2/businesses:
      GET:
        description:
          Get all businesses operating in Bedrock
        parameters:
          industry:
            string (optional) - quarrying, dining, entertainment, retail
          status:
            string (optional) - active, seasonal, closed
          owner:
            string (optional) - Filter by business owner
        response_example:
          businesses:
              id:
                BIZ001
              name:
                Slate Rock and Gravel Company
              industry:
                quarrying
              owner:
                Mr. Slate
              address:
                Industrial Boulder District
              employees:
                - Fred Flintstone
                - Barney Rubble
              products:
                - Granite slabs

Industrial Boulder District
              employees:
                - Fred Flintstone
                - Barney Rubble
              products:
                - Granite slabs
                - Limestone blocks
                - Marble chips
              operating_hours:
                Dawn to Dusk
              safety_record:
                3 mammoth-years without incidents
              status:
                active
    /api/v2/businesses/{business_id}/employees:
      GET:
        description:
          Get all employees of a specific business
      POST:
        description:
          Hire a new employee
        requirements:
          citizen_id:
            Must be registered Bedrock citizen
          background_check:
            No saber-tooth tiger incidents
          references:
            At least 2 clan member references
  transportation:
    /api/v2/vehicles:
      GET:
        description:
          List all stone-age vehicles available for use

references:
            At least 2 clan member references
  transportation:
    /api/v2/vehicles:
      GET:
        description:
          List all stone-age vehicles available for use
        vehicle_types:
          - foot_car
          - mammoth_bus
          - pterodactyl_air
          - brontosaurus_crane
          - stone_motorcycle
        response_example:
          vehicles:
              id:
                VEH001
              type:
                foot_car
              model:
                Flintstone Family Cruiser
              owner:
                Fred Flintstone
              passenger_capacity:
                4
              fuel_type:
                Leg power
              top_speed:
                25 mph (downhill with tailwind)
              features:
                - Rock radio
                - Stone steering wheel
                - Mammoth fur seats
              maintenance_schedule:
                Oil feet weekly
              insurance_status:

- Rock radio
                - Stone steering wheel
                - Mammoth fur seats
              maintenance_schedule:
                Oil feet weekly
              insurance_status:
                Covered by Bedrock Mutual
    /api/v2/transportation/routes:
      GET:
        description:
          Get available transportation routes in Bedrock
        response_example:
          routes:
              id:
                ROUTE001
              name:
                Downtown Cobblestone Express
              stops:
                - Flintstone House
                - Rubble House
                - Bedrock Mall
                - Slate Rock and Gravel Co.
                - Bowling Alley
              schedule:
                Every 30 minutes during daylight
              fare:
                2 clams per trip
              operated_by:
                Bedrock Transportation Authority
  entertainment:
    /api/v2/events:
      GET:
        description:
          Get upc

are:
                2 clams per trip
              operated_by:
                Bedrock Transportation Authority
  entertainment:
    /api/v2/events:
      GET:
        description:
          Get upcoming entertainment events in Bedrock
        parameters:
          event_type:
            string (optional) - bowling, drive_in_movie, concert, sports
          date_range:
            string (optional) - today, this_week, this_month
          venue:
            string (optional) - Filter by venue name
        response_example:
          events:
              id:
                EVT001
              name:
                Bedrock Bowling Championship
              type:
                bowling
              venue:
                Bedrock Bowl
              date:
                Stone Age Year 5, Dino Month 15
              time:
                After sunset
              participants:
                - Fred Flintstone
                - Barney Rubble
                - Frank Frankstone

5, Dino Month 15
              time:
                After sunset
              participants:
                - Fred Flintstone
                - Barney Rubble
                - Frank Frankstone
              prizes:
                - Golden Bowling Ball
                - 50 clams
                - Lifetime supply of Brontosaurus burgers
              admission:
                5 clams
              dress_code:
                Cave formal
    /api/v2/drive-in:
      GET:
        description:
          Get current and upcoming movies at the Bedrock Drive-In
        response_example:
          now_showing:
              title:
                The Flintstones in Viva Rock Vegas
              genre:
                Comedy/Romance
              rating:
                Suitable for all cave ages
              runtime:
                90 stone minutes
              showtimes:
                - Sunset
                - Late Night
              admission:
                3 clams per car

s
              runtime:
                90 stone minutes
              showtimes:
                - Sunset
                - Late Night
              admission:
                3 clams per car
              concessions:
                - Brontosaurus burgers
                - Pterodactyl wings
                - Rock candy
  utilities:
    /api/v2/utilities/power:
      GET:
        description:
          Check power grid status (dinosaur-powered)
        response_example:
          grid_status:
            operational
          power_sources:
              type:
                Brontosaurus Generator
              capacity:
                500 stone-watts
              efficiency:
                High when well-fed
              maintenance:
                Daily grooming required
          current_load:
            450 stone-watts
          estimated_downtime:
            Lunch break: 12-1 PM daily
      POST:
        description:
          Request new power connection
        requir

current_load:
            450 stone-watts
          estimated_downtime:
            Lunch break: 12-1 PM daily
      POST:
        description:
          Request new power connection
        requirements:
          property_address:
            Valid Bedrock address
          usage_estimate:
            Expected stone-watt consumption
          deposit:
            50 clams (refundable)
    /api/v2/utilities/water:
      GET:
        description:
          Check water system status
        response_example:
          water_quality:
            Crystal clear spring water
          source:
            Natural rock springs
          distribution_method:
            Woolly mammoth delivery trucks
          service_areas:
            - Cobblestone Way
            - Granite Street
            - Limestone Lane
          emergency_contact:
            Bedrock Water Works - Call 'WATER' on shell phone
  emergency:
    /api/v2/emergency/fire:
      POST:
        description:
          Report

- Limestone Lane
          emergency_contact:
            Bedrock Water Works - Call 'WATER' on shell phone
  emergency:
    /api/v2/emergency/fire:
      POST:
        description:
          Report fire emergency
        emergency_contact:
          Bedrock Fire Department
        response_time:
          5 minutes (dinosaur-powered fire truck)
        equipment:
          - Stone ladders
          - Water-squirting dinosaurs
          - Rescue pterodactyls
        request_example:
          location:
            301 Cobblestone Way
          fire_type:
            Cave fire
          severity:
            major
          people_trapped:
            False
          caller_name:
            Fred Flintstone
          callback_shell_number:
            BEDROCK-FIRE
    /api/v2/emergency/police:
      POST:
        description:
          Report crime or request police assistance
        response_example:
          incident_id:
            CRIME001
          status:
            Dispatched

ice:
      POST:
        description:
          Report crime or request police assistance
        response_example:
          incident_id:
            CRIME001
          status:
            Dispatched
          responding_officer:
            Officer Slate
          estimated_arrival:
            10 stone minutes
          case_number:
            BR-2024-001
  weather:
    /api/v2/weather/current:
      GET:
        description:
          Get current weather conditions in Bedrock
        response_example:
          temperature:
            75 cave degrees
          conditions:
            Sunny with occasional pterodactyl clouds
          wind:
            Light breeze from the tar pits
          humidity:
            Comfortably dry
          visibility:
            Clear to the next mountain
          uv_index:
            Dinosaur-safe levels
          air_quality:
            Fresh stone air
    /api/v2/weather/forecast:
      GET:
        description:
          Get weather foreca

ntain
          uv_index:
            Dinosaur-safe levels
          air_quality:
            Fresh stone air
    /api/v2/weather/forecast:
      GET:
        description:
          Get weather forecast for upcoming days
        parameters:
          days:
            integer (1-7) - Number of days to forecast
        response_example:
          forecast:
              date:
                Tomorrow
              temperature_high:
                80 cave degrees
              temperature_low:
                60 cave degrees
              conditions:
                Partly cloudy with chance of meteor showers
              precipitation:
                10% chance of rock rain
error_codes:
  400:
    Bad Request - Check your stone tablet formatting
  401:
    Unauthorized - Invalid or expired stone token
  403:
    Forbidden - Insufficient clan privileges
  404:
    Not Found - Resource vanished like a dinosaur
  429:
    Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded, try again after mammoth

ed stone token
  403:
    Forbidden - Insufficient clan privileges
  404:
    Not Found - Resource vanished like a dinosaur
  429:
    Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded, try again after mammoth hour
  500:
    Internal Server Error - Volcano erupted in our data cave
  503:
    Service Unavailable - Dinosaurs are on strike
response_formats:
  success:
    status:
      success
    data:
      ...
    timestamp:
      Stone Age timestamp
    api_version:
      2.1.0
  error:
    status:
      error
    error_code:
      404
    message:
      Resource not found in Bedrock database
    timestamp:
      Stone Age timestamp
    help_url:
      https://docs.bedrock.stone/errors
pagination:
  default_limit:
    20
  max_limit:
    100
  parameters:
    limit:
      Number of results per page
    offset:
      Number of results to skip
    has_more:
      Boolean indicating if more results exist
changelog:
  2.1.0:
    date:
      Stone Age Year 5
    changes:
      - Added dinosaur rent

e
    offset:
      Number of results to skip
    has_more:
      Boolean indicating if more results exist
changelog:
  2.1.0:
    date:
      Stone Age Year 5
    changes:
      - Added dinosaur rental endpoints
      - Improved error handling for pterodactyl network outages
      - Added weather forecasting powered by woolly mammoth meteorologists
      - Enhanced security with carved stone token authentication
  2.0.0:
    date:
      Stone Age Year 4
    changes:
      - Major API redesign with RESTful stone principles
      - Added real-time event notifications via smoke signals
      - Implemented rate limiting to prevent mammoth overload
      - Added support for multi-family queries
contact:
  support:
    Send smoke signal to Bedrock API Support
  documentation:
    https://docs.bedrock.stone
  community:
    Bedrock Developer Cave Paintings
  emergency:
    Hit rocks together three times

edrock.stone
  community:
    Bedrock Developer Cave Paintings
  emergency:
    Hit rocks together three times
